name: Exel Composites
message: [AI generated] Exel Composites is a global technology company that designs, manufactures and markets composite profiles and tubes. Founded in 1960, Exel operates in a variety of markets such as construction, transportation, and sporting goods. The company delivers high-quality, durable products that leverage the benefits of composite materials, including strength, lightness, durability, and conductivity. Headquartered in Finland, Exel has a worldwide presence.
